parameters.query:
WITH access_result AS (
  SELECT inbox.execute_knowledge_access_command($1::bigint, $2::text, $3::text) AS result
), relation_result AS (
  SELECT inbox.execute_relation_command($1::bigint, $2::text, $3::text) AS result
), command_result AS (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN access_result.result->>'route' <> 'delegate' THEN access_result.result
    WHEN relation_result.result->>'route' <> 'delegate' THEN relation_result.result
    WHEN lower($2::text) IN ('review', 'edit', 'unarchive', 'related')
      THEN inbox.execute_knowledge_curation_command($1::bigint, $2::text, $3::text)
    ELSE inbox.execute_memory_command($1::bigint, $2::text, $3::text)
  END AS result
  FROM access_result CROSS JOIN relation_result
)
SELECT CASE
  WHEN lower($2::text) IN ('memory', 'review', 'edit', 'unarchive', 'related', 'duplicates', 'graph', 'file', 'download', 'merge')
    AND result->>'route' = 'direct'
    THEN result || jsonb_build_object('route', 'curation_direct')
  ELSE result
END AS result, $4::text AS chat_id
FROM command_result;

WITH action AS (
  SELECT pending.id, pending.user_id, pending.target_inbox_item_id
  FROM inbox.pending_actions pending
  WHERE pending.id = $1::uuid AND pending.status = 'confirmed'
), objects AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT attachment.storage_bucket, attachment.object_key
  FROM action
  JOIN inbox.attachments attachment ON attachment.inbox_item_id = action.target_inbox_item_id
  WHERE attachment.storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2'
    AND attachment.upload_status = 'stored'
    AND attachment.storage_bucket IS NOT NULL
    AND attachment.object_key IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM inbox.attachments other
      WHERE other.inbox_item_id <> action.target_inbox_item_id
        AND other.storage_provider = attachment.storage_provider
        AND other.storage_bucket = attachment.storage_bucket
        AND other.object_key = attachment.object_key
        AND other.upload_status = 'stored'
    )
)
SELECT action.id::text AS action_id, action.target_inbox_item_id::text AS item_id,
  $2::text AS chat_id, $3::text AS title,
  coalesce((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('bucket', storage_bucket, 'key', object_key)) FROM objects), '[]'::jsonb) AS objects_to_delete
FROM action;

nodes.name: Skip Shared or Missing B2 Objects

parameters.jsCode:
const source = $('Prepare Safe Deletion').first().json;
return [{ json: source }];

parameters.query:
WITH marked AS (
  UPDATE inbox.pending_actions
  SET status = 'completed', completed_at = now(), error_message = NULL
  WHERE id = $1::uuid AND status = 'confirmed'
  RETURNING target_inbox_item_id
), deleted AS (
  DELETE FROM inbox.inbox_items item
  USING marked
  WHERE item.id = marked.target_inbox_item_id
  RETURNING item.id
)
SELECT $2::text AS chat_id, $3::text AS title,
  coalesce((SELECT left(id::text, 8) FROM deleted), left($4::text, 8)) AS short_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deleted) AS deleted;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Prepare Safe Deletion').first().json.action_id, $('Prepare Safe Deletion').first().json.chat_id, $('Prepare Safe Deletion').first().json.title, $('Prepare Safe Deletion').first().json.item_id ] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { filter: { must: [ { key: 'metadata.inbox_item_id', match: { value: $('Normalize Command Result').first().json.canonical_item_id } } ] } } }}

parameters.query: SELECT inbox.finalize_merge_action($1::uuid) AS result, $2::text AS chat_id;

WITH target AS (
  SELECT item.id, knowledge.id AS knowledge_item_id
  FROM inbox.inbox_items item
  JOIN inbox.knowledge_items knowledge ON knowledge.inbox_item_id = item.id
  WHERE item.id = $1::uuid
), removed AS (
  DELETE FROM inbox.knowledge_chunks chunk USING target
  WHERE chunk.knowledge_item_id = target.knowledge_item_id
  RETURNING chunk.id
), cancelled AS (
  UPDATE inbox.processing_jobs job SET status = 'cancelled', locked_at = NULL, locked_by = NULL
  FROM target
  WHERE job.inbox_item_id = target.id AND job.job_type = 'index' AND job.status IN ('pending', 'running', 'failed')
), queued AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.processing_jobs (inbox_item_id, job_type, status, payload)
  SELECT id, 'index', 'pending', jsonb_build_object('reason', 'telegram_reindex') FROM target
  RETURNING inbox_item_id
), updated AS (
  UPDATE inbox.inbox_items item SET status = 'indexing', error_code = NULL, error_message = NULL
  FROM target WHERE item.id = target.id
)
SELECT queued.inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id, $2::text AS chat_id, $3::text AS title, left(queued.inbox_item_id::text, 8) AS short_id, (SELECT count(*) FROM removed) AS old_chunks_removed
FROM queued;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Normalize Command Result').first().json.item_id, $('Normalize Command Result').first().json.chat_id, $('Normalize Command Result').first().json.title ] }}

main.node: Skip Shared or Missing B2 Objects
